topic: Indian Self-Help Groups to Produce 200,000 National Flags for Independence Day
headline: DELHI GOVT TASKS SELF-HELP GROUPS WITH PRODUCING 200,000 NATIONAL FLAGS FOR INDEPENDENCE DAY CAMPAIGN
summary: Self-Help Groups (SHGs) across Delhi have been tasked with producing 200,000 national flags ahead of Independence Day as part of the Har Ghar Tiranga 2026 campaign. The Delhi government's initiative aims to promote the campaign and empower women through economic activities. SHGs have been recognized for their positive impact on women's economic, social, and political empowerment. The groups will play a significant role in the campaign, with each eligible SHG contributing to the production of national flags.
